messages.content: 地上的部分包含各类地理信息（GIS），包括油田的河流，道路，管网（橙色线），和地面建筑区，可以在Layers这里进行选择和和切换。对油田关键地面设施的位置也进行了标注。比如，EPF处理站和OGM计算设备等。通过这个3D模型可以对油田地面情况有一个宏观的把控。 英文

The above-ground portion contains various types of geographic information (GIS), including rivers, roads, pipelines (orange lines), and surface building areas within the oil field, which can be selected and switched in Layers. The locations of critical ground facilities in the oil field are also labeled, such as EPF processing stations and OGM computing equipment. This 3D model provides a macro understanding of the surface situation in the oil field.

根据不同的尺度，数字油田模型分为三个不同的视角，同时三个不同的视角对数字油田进行管理。
首先是油田的整体的视角，包括油田地面地下的各类信息。
英文

According to different scales, the digital oil field model is divided into three different perspectives, each of which manages the digital oil field in a different way. The first is the overall perspective of the oil field, including various information on both the surface and subsurface of the oil field.
perspective和 scenarios的区别

Perspective和scenarios都是描述未来或者预测某种情况的思维工具，但它们的区别在于：

Perspective是一种描述未来的视角或者框架，通常是通过对当前问题或者挑战的分析，对可能出现的未来情况进行概括性描述，以便更好地理解和处理当前决策和行动。Perspective帮助我们了解在未来的某个时间段内，各种事件和情况可能会如何发展。

Scenarios则更具体，是一种对未来发展情况进行全面描述和预测的模型方法。它通常包括多个假设或者概率上的可能性，并根据不同的假设或情况，提供不同的应对策略。Scenarios可以帮助人们规划特定情况下的行动和决策，以最大限度地发挥影响力，达到预期目标。

因此，Perspective更侧重于提供一种理解未来发展方向的框架，而Scenarios则更侧重于提供具体的未来情况和各种应对措施的细节。
当然也包括油田地下的主要资产，包括地下的底层和油井，以及目前已经发现的油藏。油井根据实际的钻井轨迹进行建模，包含直井、定向井（斜井）和水平井，通过这些油井将原油开采到地面，然后通过处理设施处理后，通过管道进行外输。油藏也是根据目前已经掌握的数据进行了刻画， 油藏实际是嵌入在地下岩层中的，深色部分是地下的岩层，不同时期形成的岩层有不同的特征。英文

The overall perspective of the oil field includes various information on both the surface and subsurface of the oil field, including the main assets underground, such as the underlying strata, oil wells and discovered oil reservoirs. Oil wells are modeled based on the actual drilling trajectory, including vertical, directional (deviated), and horizontal wells. Crude oil is extracted to the surface through these wells, processed with processing facilities, and transported through pipelines. The oil reservoir is depicted based on the data currently available. The oil reservoir is actually embedded in the underground rock formations, with darker portions representing the underlying rock layers. Rock formations from different periods have different characteristics.
通过点击split可以对地下油藏进行剖分，可以单独拿出一个油藏进行观察，和对比，了解油藏的展布情况。英文
By clicking "split," the underground oil reservoir can be split and isolated for observation and comparison, allowing for a better understanding of the distribution of the oil reservoir.
跟踪钻井的情况，这是目前我们正在钻的井，通过接入物联网的实时数据可以在3D虚拟空间中跟踪钻井的情况。这是一口油田目前正在作业的钻井，记录了钻井的信息，包括钻井的编号，目前钻到的深度，还有一些钻井作业的相关参数。英文

Tracking the drilling situation allows us to monitor our active drilling wells in real-time through IoT data integration in the 3D virtual space. This oil field currently has an active drilling well, with recorded information including the well number, current drilling depth, and other relevant parameters for drilling operations.
通过接入实时数据和物联网数据可以实现钻井跟踪。英文
The drilling tracking can be achieved by integrating real-time data and IoT data.

第二个维度是油田的产站，相比与油田整体是一个中等的尺度，主要针对油田的场站和处理设施。通过对油田场站的设施设备进行了3D重建，实现油田场站的还原，可以直观了解油田场站的基本情况。包括  油的储罐， ，加热装置， 无烟的燃烧装置等。以及地面井口的分布情况。（星空）集成了油田生产情况的一些信息，可以快速查看油田整体生产数据，掌握油田的生产动态情况。在实际的生产系统中，还开业接入油田场站的监控，实时了解油田场站现场的情况。英文

The second dimension is the production facilities of the oil field, which is of a medium scale compared to the entire oil field and mainly focuses on the site and processing facilities. 3D reconstruction of the equipment and facilities on the oil field site has been carried out, allowing for a visual understanding of the basic situation at the oil field site. This includes storage tanks for oil, heating equipment, smokeless combustion systems, etc., as well as the distribution of surface wellheads. Starry Sky integrates some of the production information of the oil field, allowing for quick access to overall production data and an understanding of the production dynamics of the oil field. In actual production systems, monitoring systems are also installed at oil field sites to obtain real-time information on the operating conditions of the oil field site.

第三个维度是有关井筒的信息，这是更小的尺度，重点关注油田生产最核心的设备，就是油井。我们对地下的井进行了数字化重建，可以在3D空间查看井的基本结构。底面部是井口地面的部分，通过井口的装置，通过与管线连接，将原油输送出来。绿色采油树一下的部分，是井埋藏在地下的部分，内部包含各类管柱设备，实现油田井的不同功能。

也可以点击Split对井的主要结构进行分解，可以抓取这些组件继续交互的操作。 Label可以快速查看井的一些相关信息。
通过动画效果对井的生产历史进行还原。
Nature 这个阶段油井出入自喷生产状体，通过地层本身的压力实现油井的生产。
ESP 这个阶段随着地层压力的下降，通过将电泵放入井筒中，将油抽取出来，实现油井的持续生产。
通过VR环境实现手势的交互操作，拖拽，放大，移动，旋转等。
英文

The third dimension focuses on the wellbore information, which is of a smaller scale and mainly centers around the core equipment of oil field production, which is the oil well. We have digitally reconstructed the underground wells and their basic structures can be viewed in 3D space. The bottom part represents the portion of the wellhead that is located on the surface, which, through various devices, is connected to pipelines to transport crude oil. The green part below the oil wellhead represents the section of the well that is buried underground and contains various pipe-column equipment to achieve the different functions of the oil field well.

By clicking on "split," the main structure of the well can be broken down, allowing for further interactive operations on its components. Labels can be used to quickly view relevant information on the well. An animated effect is used to restore the production history of the well.

During the nature stage, the well produces through natural pressure from the reservoir. As the pressure in the reservoir decreases, an electric submersible pump (ESP) is installed into the wellbore to continuously pump out the oil and maintain production. VR environment provides gesture-based interaction operation such as dragging, zooming, moving, and rotating, etc.
tracking 啥意思
"Tracking" 是追踪的意思。在数字油田中，"tracking"通常用于描述对生产或作业情况进行实时监控和追踪的过程。通过实时获取数据，可以更好地了解生产或作业的状态，并及时做出相应的决策和处理。
设计了一套4D井筒系统，通过监控，历史回购，分析预警，数据集成，形成油田的关键资产。以时间轴的形式记录井筒的作业历史，利用传感器获取实时井筒状态，通过机器学习等方预测井筒状态，帮助油田管理全面掌握井的现在和过去。英文

A 4D wellbore system has been designed, which serves as a critical asset to the oil field through monitoring, historical retrieval, analysis, warning, and data integration. The working history of the wellbore is recorded on a timeline, and real-time wellbore status is obtained through sensors and machine learning techniques are employed for predicting the wellbore status. This enables comprehensive management of the present and past conditions of the oil field wells.
生产数据，井数据，被整合在统一的平台，实现油田的生产动态的在线分析。该系统基本b/s构建，利用web技术实现，扩大了其适用性。英文

Production and well data are integrated into a unified platform, enabling online analysis of the production dynamics of the oil field. This system is built on a basic b/s structure, utilizing web technology to increase its adaptability.
利于web3d技术，实现了油田数字模型的可视化，通过接入物联网数据，对现场生产情况进行实时监控。英文

With the help of web3D technology, visualization of the oil field digital model has been made possible, and real-time monitoring of on-site production conditions is achieved through the integration of IoT data.
